description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named Build and Test that runs on every push. The workflow should have four jobs: build-linux, build-wayland, build-macos, and build-windows. Each job should run on a different environment (ubuntu-20.04, ubuntu-latest, macos-latest, and windows-latest respectively), check out the code, install prerequisites, create a build directory, configure CMake with a specific build type, and then build the project.
